stemHtml: Complete the following statement correctly as regards the capacity of a chemical oxygen generator and regulating the oxygen flow. The capacity is in the range of...

options.a: 60 minutes to 120 minutes and the flow is regulated by a dual outlet connector.
options.b: 12 minutes to 20 minutes and the flow cannot be regulated.
options.c: 12 minutes to 20 minutes and the flow can be stopped by stowing the oxygen mask.
options.d: 60 minutes to 120 minutes and the flow cannot be regulated.
